loss_recommendation: Mild imbalance: standard CrossEntropy with light class weights is sufficient.

leakage.note: Within-class matching. The earlier bare-pHash check reported 1 group, but that was a FALSE POSITIVE (a 64-bit pHash collision between an Evaniidae and an unrelated Lasiocampidae). The corrected within-class check finds 11 genuine near-duplicate groups that span the ORIGINAL train_mini<->val split. All 11 are neutralised by the delivered group-safe re-split (split_assignments.csv), which keeps each duplicate group within a single split -> 0 cross-split leakage in the consumed dataset (see dataset_config.json: leakage_groups_spanning_splits=0).
leakage.verdict: 11 within-class near-duplicate groups span the original train_mini/val split (neutralised by the group-safe re-split; consumed dataset has 0 leakage)
